concept: Kubernetes container orchestration: apps/v1 Deployment manifest schema, container runtime dependency.
evidence: Kubernetes documentation (kubernetes.io/docs) — Deployment (apps/v1) workload resource, selectors, pod templates
Kubernetes container runtimes documentation — CRI-compatible runtime requirement
facts: # assembled by the DSCE orchestration assembler (Kubernetes)

apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: app-deployment
spec:
  replicas: 2
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: app
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: app
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: app
        image: app:latest
        ports:
        - containerPort: 8080
